title: SiTime Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript - Record Performance
text: SiTime delivered record first-quarter earnings in 2026, with revenue of $113.6 million versus the analyst estimate of $105.5 million, and non-GAAP EPS of $1.44 versus the analyst estimate of $1.18. The company's Q1 beat and AI data center push fuel bullish sentiment. For Q2 2026 guidance, revenue guidance is $140 million to $150 million, up more than 100% year over year, with gross margin forecast at approximately 65% (plus or minus 1 point), operating expenses of $46 million to $47 million, and non-GAAP EPS range of $1.85 to $2. For the full year, the company is increasing revenue growth expectations to at least 80%, well above prior expectations and the long-term target growth rate of 25%-30%.
